items.name_en: A highly anticipated BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag🔥. The entire body is crafted from top-tier nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is practical and popular, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443. Dimensions: 22*13*9

items.name_en: A spacious Catherine bag, crafted from selected large-scale brand plaid and smooth Italian tanned leather. Geometric pieces paired with the brand logo, inspired by the collar shape of a classic Trench coat. Debuted at Burberry Fall/Winter Women's Collection, named after the founder's wife (mother of 6 children). Features a reinforced leather handle or a detachable shoulder strap. At least 30% of the main materials are bio-based, derived from plants and castor oil. 28 x 13 x 23cm. Top leather handle. Detachable adjustable shoulder strap. Zipper closure with side snap buttons. 2 external flap pockets, 2 internal slip pockets. Hand-painted edges. Glossy metal hardware. Front embossed Burberry logo
items.name_cn: A spacious Catherine bag, crafted from selected large-scale brand plaid and smooth Italian tanned leather. Geometric pieces paired with the brand logo, inspired by the collar shape of a classic Trench coat. Debuted at Burberry Fall/Winter Women's Collection, named after the founder's wife (mother of 6 children). Features a reinforced leather handle or a detachable shoulder strap. At least 30% of the main materials are bio-based, derived from plants and castor oil. 28 x 13 x 23cm. Top leather handle. Detachable adjustable shoulder strap. Zipper closure with side snap buttons. 2 external flap pockets, 2 internal slip pockets. Hand-painted edges. Glossy metal hardware. Front embossed Burberry logo

items.name_en: A❤【Ostrich Black】
items.name_cn:
A❤【Ostrich Black】
Loro Piana Extra pocket L19 Series Bestseller
A life without definition is the most comfortable, just like Loro Piana's material and design. Styles without complex designs, with simple and soft contours that are elegant and timeless, like a exquisite makeup case, perfectly balancing aesthetics and functionality. The leather is fine, feeling as soft as butter. The compact body has a large capacity. It can be carried by hand with a thin strap or crossbody. Sisters who love minimalist style can get this one. Simple and versatile, the simpler, the more unique. Celebrities and influencers are raving about it. It's hard not to love it with such rare leather.
Size: Small: 19×7×12cm

items.name_en: A2210 Large In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
items.name_cn:
A2210 Large In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
It's no exaggeration to say this is a vintage backpack that can be passed down! Classic double C logo, quilted pattern
Paired with a gold metal leather chain strap, it feels substantial
Sheepskin is soft and delicate, making it impossible not to want to own and cherish it! Suitable for all seasons, any style💃
Must-have in your bag closet, available in black
Dimensions: 21*10*20.5cm.
1091063
